review_title: Great cloud community
description: My overall experience with mega has been delightful.
author: Jerad C.
pros: What I like the most about mega is that it's more that a "cloud storage", it's a community of people who share with other people either photos, documents, music, etc.
cons: What I like the least is if you happen to forget your password to your account, then it is very very difficult to be able to regain access, and if you have a lot of files that you don't want to not be able to access, then remember your password, or even write it down and hide it.

review_title: It is good to have Mega Storage. Even if it is a company out of the country
description: It has been a good experience, I think i store some stuff on Google drive and the other stuff I save on mega. I think i have really gotten used to both products
author: Joseph G.
pros: It has been around for a long time. I think it is one of the better cloud storage alternatives. I almost gave it five stars.
cons: It is not very easy to reset the pass word. I think I have not figured out alternatives to a password system, I think it would be good if it had finger print reading ability

review_title: Fraudulent Scammers with a broken app and a bot driven support department
description: Horrible, scammers, app doesn’t work and the customer service department is an uncaring Ai robot who just repeats itself no matter what you say.
author: Lady H.
pros: The experience was unilaterally awful and there was nothing to like, the app doesn’t work and the support department doesn’t care.
cons: They scammed me - I signed up for 1 month and they charged me for 1 year. Their support department refused to correct the issue. I signed up to download videos from someone who stores on Mega - when I try to download I get the error “insufficient disk space” even though the video is only 1GB and I have 15GB free on my iPad and 3TB free in Mega. So I was fraudulently charged over $100 and still can’t download the videos.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Mega Reliability
description: I cannot stress enough how reliable this software is. The support team as well. It was a great purchase and I recommend it.
author: Becky M.
pros: Mega has never let me down and it has more features than I expected. I like that Mega syncs with my computer so that when I change something it s reflected on Mega as well. I really liked that I was able to select only particular folders for this, and I did not have to do it with all of my files. It saves time and prioritizes the files I choose. Running out of storage has never been a concern. The desktop app is helpful and easy to use, but I can also use the web or mobile app. It's still easy to share with someone who does not have an account with Mega. When sharing I can allow the recipient to view only or I can allow full access. I can also set the invitation to expire so that the shared file cannot be viewed after the date/time I choose.
cons: Although they offer much more than just cloud storage, Mega is not part of a complete ecosystem like some other cloud storage options. This can make some processes more tedious.

review_title: MEGA Prominently Delivers Exceptional Cloud Storage & Collaboration Utilities
description: MEGA is by far the fastest data-transfer, silky-smooth cloud service I've utilized over the past 7 or so years. I don't think I'll be changing to a different cloud alternative anytime soon since I don't wish to lose my work contacts list & organized data folders. Plus, it's an awesome backup tool that I can retrieve whatever data I've stored on my phone or computers at any given time.
author: Mohammad M.
pros: Blazing-fast data transfer rates, secure backup, reliable collaboration tools & compatibility with various file formats are some of the core features I use almost daily to accomplish work with high efficiency & efficacy.
cons: I have no complaints whatsoever with the service. It's just great.

review_title: Cloud Storage with Best File Manager
description: Overall experience with Mega is great. We use it for file sharing between agency and client. It is so convenient for technical people at the agency and the laymen at the client-side. Apart from the bandwidth thing, it is so simple and easy to use, and highly reccomended.
author: Nasir A.
pros: The best thing about Mega is its File Manager. The File Manager or the UI is so simple and easy to use. There is Drag and Drop Functionality which is very helpful. Unlike other cloud storage, its interface is just like our operating systems where file management is so easy and simple. Even a layman can use it easily. 2nd thing is its free space, as it provides 20GB to 50GB free space for new users.
cons: The least likable thing about Mega is its bandwidth limitation. As you can not download and upload unlimited data on the Mega free version, even on paid version there is a data upload and download limit. On the comparator Cloud and File sharing, there is almost no bandwidth.

review_title: I cannot imagine my life without Mega storage
description: I love Mega as cloud storage is one of the best options
author: Tameem A.
pros: So reliable and easy to use, also has large storage space compared to other clouds
cons: Sometimes when I try to download files from other clouds, there is a daily limit when it comes to large files or folders

review_title: Excellent Storage
description: Good. Have used for quite some time and haven't had any noteworthy issues.
author: Trevor H.
pros: Keeps what I need to store safe and secure, and allows me access all the time.
cons: With latest updates I can't think of anything that would cause me to say anything negative.

review_title: Mega is an alright anonymous file sharing tool
author: Whitney L.
pros: I like the file sharing capability and storage even with the free version it will allow a certain amount of upload and download size for free.
cons: I least like the fact that if you want to store larger files you do have to eventually pay for that storage and also after so many days of non use your account will be wiped clear of files stored so it requires consistent usage.

review_title: Feature rich, affordable and secure cloud storage
description: I use Mega often to store and share large files both for internal use within my company and also when sharing files with external clients.
author: David S.
pros: Mega is extremely intuitive and easy to use. It is also a very cost effective cloud storage medium and I feel confident in its high level of security and data protection.
cons: They no longer have the ability to create a public dropzone where visitors can upload content without having to log in.

review_title: Good cloud with free storage
description: I use it for sharing files and for storing large photos/videos i can’t keep on my device
author: Lorenzo M.
pros: I like the amount of free storage it offers and the possibility of sharing files
cons: Can’t recover password without secret key, i had to recreate my account to start using it again. While this is great on the security aspect, it isn’t convenient for people like me who just want to share their files
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: My go-to backup and cloud storage solution
description: Overall, highly recommended as a cloud backup, file transfer, and storage tool.
author: Julian H.
pros: I've used Mega for many years and always found it simple to use, intuitive, and quick to transfer and upload large quantities of files. It's my go-to for backup and storage, and offers great solutions for file-sharing and transfer, too. Built-in encryption is also good, meaning good security and privacy options. Finally, the price-point is fair, and there's a decent mid-tier offering which has always been enough for me, and I expect should cover most users' needs.
cons: No real negatives here... The website can be a little slow sometimes when you have a large Cloud Drive, but the app itself runs well.

review_title: Secure and Affordable Cloud Storage
description: I recommend Mega for those who needs a reliable and affordable cloud storage.
author: Felipe M.
pros: Mega is a great option for a low-cost cloud storage. I've been using Mega for over 5 years now and it has been a reliable and easy-to-use service. One of the things I like most about Mega is the amount of storage space available for free accounts. Plus, the pricing for paid plans is very reasonable.
cons: The synchronization and file transfer process can sometimes take longer than expected, especially when dealing with larger files or when there is a slow internet connection

review_title: Best for storing media type file
author: Shahirah L.
pros: I have use MEGA to share and store media type files, like video and audio, as they has an embedded player than can stream the media directly from the software without me having to download the file before playing it. They have a free account that has decent amount of free storage that user can use it freely.
cons: Downloading the files from the web browser version of the software is not effective at all. I need to stay on the MEGA webpage on the download process, and if i change to the other tab, the download process will be halt and worst, i had to start the download process from the beginning.

review_title: best cloud data storage tool
description: MEGA allows me to store huge amounts of files in complete confidentiality
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: the app allows me to download, stream, view, share, rename or delete my files from any device. in it is easy to integrate.
cons: the application sometimes bugs when a file download is in progress

review_title: Love it
author: Fortunato B.
pros: I only use a few cloud storage softwares, and MEGA proved to be one of the best softwares currently available. Amazing and intuitive interface, it is really easy to use and it's incredibly fast in download when compared to other softwares. Love it.
cons: There's nothing I dislike about MEGA, it always proved to be a valid ally.

review_title: Best cloud storage platform
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: MEGA give free 50gb of cloud storage. Thats 5 times more space than the free storage Google Drive offered. You can also sync you files to MEGA for backup when neccessary.
cons: MEGA is the best cloud storage. Everything works for me.

review_title: Review about MEGA
author: Shenuka H.
pros: Have been using this tool since Corona pandemic. Easy to upload files, photos, videos to cloud storage without any issues. Also I was able to add passcode to app which important. UI is perfect and simple.
cons: I don't have any dislike features about this perfect cloud storage tool

review_title: Store your Data
description: I really loved using this app with no cost. I can able to share the media to the non users of MEGA.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: This app is inexpensive and can able to store the media with no cost. The features and all are good. We can able to transfer the data.
cons: Need to focus on costumer care. It takes time to respond.

review_title: They should be more fair at local pricing
author: Ibrahim S.
pros: My favourite thing about MEGA is its transfer speed.
cons: I do appreciate that we get 20 GBs of storage for free but it could have been higher. I know it used to be higher but they should have never been downgrade it or they could do better at local pricing.

review_title: Access your files anywhere, anytime, and from any web browser
description: Since MEGA came out with a new service, I was able to share files with my friends in a more secure way. I was able to try it out for free, which is a plus!
author: Ezechiel Narcisse A.
pros: MEGA is a simple and secure way to access files anywhere in the world. MEGA encrypts files both in transit and at rest, and is one of the few cloud storage services to do so. They offer 50GB of storage for free. You can also upgrade to higher storage options.
cons: when you want to recover a large file, you have to use the software or the mobile app, even if you are connected to another computer than yours. Why not let the user choose to continue with the web browser
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: The most difficult software ever tried.
description: I m using Mega for University; my colleagues decided ti apply and share files running by that channel. Definitely it s difficult to use, don t forget your password, have to pay for space and the last but not the list..in Italy is not legal to share university files on it! So tale care!
author: Althea S.
pros: Ok, this is a real useful software, but it needs urgently to be adjusted. Absolutely difficult signing up. You can do it by yourself and in that case ok, sounds good. But if you need to ente e into a group for view files, you need an invitation. If you get it, you have only one chance to log in, i entered up and made e mistake , so i needed a new invitation. No way. If you clear a file or an address, you ll never adjuste it, no more view for you!
cons: I only like the idea, but it a difficult to use, you pay for adesso space and the most important thing, is if you forget your password, you’ll not have a view to get it back. You lost simply your channel, and that’s it!!!!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A file storage system that works well!
description: Overall, the experience with MEGA has been great so far with just a little spanner that they don't have smaller plans to cater to an individual's requirements who doesn't need 400GB of space. Also, the transfer caps is something that only MEGA has and no other vendor is having that.
author: Sajal G.
pros: Ease of UI and really simple UI and UX besides getting a 50GB free space.
cons: Pricing - that's a pain point. Google One is offering 200GB worth of space at just about USD28 per year whereas the minimum Mega plan is with 400GB of space at USD68 per year.

review_title: Mega
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The program is well known, and the most important thing that I liked is the flexibility of transferring files to and from the cloud, so that when there is an interruption in the Internet service, the transfer of files can be completed from the point it reached automatically without having to repeat the whole process again.
cons: In general, I had no problems using the program, but I hope the user interface will be improved.

review_title: Mega used to be my #1 choice
description: It's a good service. Obviously they care about the people and give cloud storage while being reasonable rates.
author: Elisabeth V.
pros: I loved the amount of storage you used to have. I love the ease of sharing things via links with my friends, or the way to access my materials online.
cons: Well, the system used to be 50gb storage. Now they've lowered it to 20gb which is a bit better then the 15gb that google gives, and the 5gb that others have. Regardless it just used to be more.
